chunks.text: Accelerating Randomized Numerical Linear Algebra on a Short-Vector Machine (EECS-2025-190) by Jingyi Xu, Borivoje Nikolic and Sophia Shao. End-to-end Heterogeneous System Design for Hyperscale Big-Data Processing by Abraham Gonzalez. FireAxe: Partitioned FPGA-Accelerated Simulation of Large-Scale RTL Designs (EECS-2024-220) by Joonho Whangbo, Krste AsanoviĂ„Â‡ and Borivoje Nikolic.

The Saturn Microarchitecture Manual (EECS-2024-215) by Jerry Zhao, Daniel Grubb, Miles Rusch, Tianrui Wei, Kevin Anderson, Borivoje Nikolic and Krste AsanoviĂ„Â‡. Accelerating Deep Learning on Heterogenous Architectures (EECS-2022-100) by Avinash Nandakumar. An Open, Scalable Massive MIMO Testbed Operating at E-Band Frequencies (EECS-2020-194) by James Dunn.

Time-interleaved SAR ADC Design Using Berkeley Analog Generator (EECS-2020-109) by Zhaokai Liu. Configurable Data Converters for Digitally Adaptive Radio (EECS-2019-156) by Amy Whitcombe. System Architecture and Signal Processing Techniques for Massive Multi-user Antenna Arrays (EECS-2019-149) by Antonio Puglielli, Borivoje Nikolic and Elad Alon.

Energy-Efficient System Design Through Adaptive Voltage Scaling (EECS-2019-146) by Ben Keller. Nested-Parallelism PageRank on RISC-V Vector Multi-Processors (EECS-2019-6) by Alon Amid. Variability-Aware Compact Modeling of Nano-scale Technologies with Customized Test Structure Designs (EECS-2018-148) by Ying Qiao.

BOOM v2: an open-source out-of-order RISC-V core (EECS-2017-157) by Christopher Celio, Pi-Feng Chiu, Borivoje Nikolic, David A. Patterson and Krste AsanoviĂ„Â‡. A Multiplying Delay-Locked Loop For A Self-Adjustable Clock Generator (EECS-2017-108) by Gary Choi. BPSK Demodulation for RF Applications (EECS-2017-91) by Yu-Ting Toh.

Design of Integrated Full-Duplex Wireless Transceivers (EECS-2017-24) by Sameet Ramakrishnan and Borivoje Nikolic. Variability Characterization of Imaging Readout Integrated Circuits in Deeply Scaled CMOS (EECS-2016-183) by Amy Whitcombe. Opportunities for Fine-Grained Adaptive Voltage Scaling to Improve System-Level Energy Efficiency (EECS-2015-257) by Ben Keller.

Flexible FFT Optimization and RTL Generation in the Chisel Hardware Design Language (EECS-2015-256) by Stephen Twigg. Modeling Radiation-Induced Soft Errors in Logic and the Overhead of Resiliency Techniques (EECS-2014-233) by Steven Bailey. Resilient Design Methodology for Energy-Efficient SRAM (EECS-2013-37) by Brian Zimmer, Borivoje Nikolic and Krste AsanoviĂ„Â‡.

Advanced MOSFET Designs and Implications for SRAM Scaling (EECS-2012-50) by Changhwan Shin. Power-efficient Design of Multi-Gpbs Wireless Baseband (EECS-2011-135) by Ji-Hoon Park and Borivoje Nikolic. A High-Throughput, Flexible LDPC Decoder for Multi-Gb/s Wireless Personal Area Networks (EECS-2010-177) by Matthew Weiner and Borivoje Nikolic.
